title: helenium scaposum
intro: Helenium scaposum, also known as Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and feathery foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues such as asthma and allergies. The health benefits of Helenium scaposum include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and acting as an expectorant to help relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of Sneezeweed can be made by infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and leaves to make a tincture or infusion for medicinal purposes.
